title: Alien's Extra Blocks
description: Adds blocks that should exist but don't
body:
![Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2fe0d408aa0dfe90d752ae8458a06065ad6dae0b.png)

### **Alien's Extra Blocks** is a mod that adds 35 brand new blocks for building.

It adds new bricks, polished variants, stairs, slabs, and walls for blocks that should have in vanilla but don't including granite, calcite, andesite, and calcite.

### **Display:**

![Showcase](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/563e1dc1bc88b9553bbbad6140453908b5f4da01_0.webp)
